name: SaaS Workspace
appropriateWhen: Teams repeatedly coordinate projects, tasks, settings, inbox items, permissions, or shared work objects.
inappropriateWhen: The main experience is a public narrative page, product storefront, or passive media feed.
mobileStrategy: Turn shared list-detail work into explicit drill-in navigation while keeping object state, permissions, and the next action visible.
signatureMovePatterns: Use the real work object and its lifecycle as navigation and hierarchy.
